articles.title: What to know about the ‘massive’ military bunker beneath Trump’s ballroom
articles.description:
Work crews have been digging in the earth for weeks, ripping out the Presidential Emergency Operations Center, or PEOC, to build something bigger, better and deeper underground.

The post What to know about the ‘massive’ military bunker beneath Trump’s ballroom appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Construction crews are expanding the Presidential Emergency Operations Center beneath Trump's ballroom in Boston.
The project aims to create a larger and more secure military bunker for national emergencies.
Local residents may experience increased construction activity and security measures in the area.

articles.title: FEMA official says he teleported to Waffle House. Experts are dubious.
articles.description:
Gregg Phillips, a top official at the Federal Emergency Management Agency, has generated numerous headlines or his claim that he once teleported to a Waffle House.

The post FEMA official says he teleported to Waffle House. Experts are dubious. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: FEMA official Gregg Phillips claims he teleported to a Waffle House, raising skepticism.
Experts question the validity of Phillips' claim, impacting public trust in FEMA.
Boston residents may be concerned about the credibility of federal officials.

articles.title: Music festival canceled after UK bars rapper Ye over antisemitic remarks
articles.description:
The British government has blocked the rapper formerly known as Kanye West from entering the U.K. am the controversy over his antisemitic statements led to calls for planned headline performances at a major music festival to be canceled.

The post Music festival canceled after UK bars rapper Ye over antisemitic remarks appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: UK bars rapper Ye from entry due to antisemitic remarks, impacting festival plans.
Major music festival canceled, affecting local artists and vendors in Boston.
Boston residents lose opportunity to attend a high-profile event scheduled for this summer.

articles.title: Nantucket flight returns after part of a cabin door opens midair
articles.description:
The aircraft remained stable and continued operating normally, and no injuries were reported, a Cape Air spokesperson told news outlets.

The post Nantucket flight returns after part of a cabin door opens midair appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cape Air flight returned to Boston after cabin door partially opened midair.
No injuries reported; aircraft remained stable during the incident.
Incident raises safety concerns for Boston residents traveling to Nantucket.
